short_description: Adds a bunch of craftable armors and weapons, mostly upgrades or alternatives to existing stuff
description:
Currently adds:

    10 superalloy swords
    Superalloy chain links and chainmail sheets
    9 pieces of superalloy chainmail
    2 pieces of superalloy trench armor
    Superheavy composite armor
    10 customizable guns with 57 interchangeable parts
    usable lathe and drill press
author: zimnybigos
